announcements.title: CBDT has issued Notification No. 80/2026 [F. No. 275/19/2026-IT(B)], notifying that specified payments such as interest, dividends, professional fees, commission, brokerage, and other financial service-related income received by eligible IFSC Units shall be exempt from TDS under the Income-tax Act, 2025. Click here
